title: graphorkis ciliata
intro: Graphorkis ciliata, also known as the hairy lip orchid, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the orchid family. It is commonly found in tropical forests and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Graphorkis ciliata include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of infusions or decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
